# Primary sources

These sources are version-sensitive. Revalidate them against the deployed tool, client, or
database version before relying on version-specific guidance.

- PostgreSQL 18 using EXPLAIN: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/using-explain.html
- PostgreSQL 18 EXPLAIN command: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/sql-explain.html
- PostgreSQL 18 planner statistics: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/planner-stats.html
- PostgreSQL 18 ANALYZE: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/sql-analyze.html
- PostgreSQL 18 monitoring statistics: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/monitoring-stats.html
- PostgreSQL 18 runtime query configuration: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/runtime-config-query.html
- PostgreSQL 18 explicit locking: https://www.postgresql.org/docs/18/explicit-locking.html
